arts.ttl: Arsenal title chances: Why Mikel Arteta's "hunters" could usurp "hunted" Liverpool in Premier League race
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole that the Gunners may prefer to be the "hunters" rather than the "hunted" in the Premier League title race.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta calls up young Arsenal midfielder who does 'things you can't coach' to pre-Man United training
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are set to lock horns in a huge Premier League clash at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday night. Arsenal will be...

arts.ttl: Manchester United have 27 days to make simple Amad decision amid transfer clause
arts.sum: Amad has been one of Man United's most exciting players this season yet sees his contract expire in June - but that could be about to change.

arts.ttl: Man United 'interested' in Dutch wonderkid who could thrive in Ruben Amorim's 3-4-3 system
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly interested in signing Feyenoord midfielder Antoni Milambo during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd dressing room UNHAPPY with latest move
arts.sum: The Red Devils players abandoned the club’s plans to wear an Adidas jacket in support of the LGBTQ+ community ahead of Sunday’s Premier League match against Everton. United were only planning a walk-out jacket as a show of support but defender Noussair Mazraoui told his team-mates he was not prepared to wear the outfit as he is of Muslim faith, reports The Athletic.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson has already told Ruben Amorim what he needs to change at Man United
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has had a positive start to his Manchester United tenure with two wins from three games so far

arts.ttl: Grant Xhaka shows true Arsenal colours ahead of Manchester United clash
arts.sum: While at Arsenal, he scored 23 goals across 297 appearances in all competitions, three of which came against United at the Emirates Stadium. In a series of Instagram stories, Xhaka shared clips of two of those goals, the first of which came in the 18/19 season as he struck from distance and wrong-footed David De Gea to find the back of the net.

arts.ttl: I worked with Mikel Arteta at Arsenal - they won’t be worried about Man Utd
arts.sum: Following the game against United, Arsenal are quickly back in Premier League action at the weekend. When asked if it’s a bad time for Arsenal to play United, following the appointment of Amorim, Round brushed off that suggestion.

arts.ttl: Man Utd dropped plans to wear rainbow jackets at weekend after a player refused
arts.sum: The Athletic reports that the player was full-back Noussair Mazraoui, who is said to have cited his Muslim faith.

arts.ttl: Man Utd flop and new Arsenal signing named in Team of the Year
arts.sum: Manchester United flop Joshua Zirkzee and new Arsenal signing Riccardo Calafiori were both named in the Serie A Team of the Year for 2024. Man Utd flop and new Arsenal signing named in Team of the Year
